chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3719 of 2019 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) For hearing of main case. 27-03-2025 None present for the petitioner. Mr. Khalid Mehmood Rajpar, advocate for respondent No.4. Mr. Sami-ur-Rehman, advocate for respondent No.6. Ms. Mahreen Ibrahim, D.A.G. This petition is pending since 2019 without any progress. Petitioner is unrepresented without any intimation or justification. Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
